expectations.evidence: The response.md file is written entirely in Italian, with all headings, analysis, recommendations, and questions in Italian language.

The response covers food-industry-specific concerns extensively: cold chain ('Catena del freddo'), EU regulations (HACCP, DOP, IGP, post-Brexit rules, IVA intracomunitaria), logistics challenges for perishable goods, certifications (biologiche, sanitarie), and food-specific questions like minimum sustainable order sizes vs shipping costs.
Only a single response.md file was created. No brief.md or PROGRESS.md files exist, and there is no directory structure (no project folder or phase subfolder).
